settings.subtitle: What's in Coastline?

settings.title: Energy At The Cellular Level
settings.description: Creatine, taurine, magnesium citrate and ergothioneine support your cell’s ability to generate and preserve usable energy — not just mask fatigue. CoQ10 further supports mitochondrial output, while inulin helps blunt post-meal glucose swings that normally cause afternoon crashes. Coastline delivers these in the right doses and timing to give you stable, sustained energy you can actually use.

settings.title: Sharp Thinking & Mental Resilience
settings.description: Ergothioneine, taurine and creatine have all been shown to support cognition under stress, while L-theanine smooths mental state without sedation. Lithium (micro-dose) supports mood regulation and long-term brain durability. Together with magnesium — critical for neurotransmission — Coastline is built to help you stay clear, focused and composed when demand spikes.

settings.title: Strong Muscles, Bones & Joints
settings.description: Creatine supports strength and power, glycine and glucosamine hydrochloride support collagen and cartilage integrity, and taurine helps muscle endurance. These matter more as you age, not less. Coastline blends them with magnesium and inulin to improve nutrient utilisation — helping you stay physically capable, not fragile.

settings.title: Cardiometabolic Support Where It Matters
settings.description: Taurine, magnesium citrate and inulin have each been shown to help improve blood pressure, glucose handling and lipid markers. CoQ10 supports vascular function, while astaxanthin helps protect against oxidative stress that injures vessels over time. Coastline is designed to reduce silent risk — not just fix what you can feel.

settings.title: Cellular Protection & Healthy Aging
settings.description: Ergothioneine, astaxanthin, lutein, zeaxanthin and CoQ10 protect against oxidative and mitochondrial stress — key drivers of biological aging. Glycine, taurine and inulin further support proteostasis, inflammation control and gut-immune balance. Coastline doesn’t chase symptoms — it supports the processes that keep you biologically younger for longer.

settings.heading: Power for the Day. Protection for the Decades.
More transparent.  More targeted.  More tested.
settings.subtitle: Why Choose Coastline?

settings.heading: "The 13 ingredients of Coastline I consider to be foundational to the future of human health."
settings.text:
"After reviewing thousands of research papers and analyzing countless supplement protocols, these 13 ingredients represent the gold standard. Each one has robust clinical evidence and addresses fundamental aspects of healthy aging that I see compromised in my practice every day."

– Greg Potter, PhD, MSc
Sleep & Circadian Health Researcher

settings.heading: "Coastline is what happens when you combine scientific rigor with real-world clinical understanding."
settings.text:
"After over two decades working in the clinical nutrition industry, I’ve seen how confusing the supplement landscape can be — even for health professionals. Coastline takes a refreshingly disciplined approach: evidence-driven ingredients, clinically meaningful doses, and clear intent behind every inclusion.

It’s a formulation built not to follow trends, but to stand the test of time — one that truly supports the biology of aging from the inside out."

 – Dr. Jacqueline Jacques, ND
Doctor of Naturopathic Medicine
Wellness Industry Expert

settings.heading: "I value Coastline's quality, scientifically rigorous ingredients. It eliminates hassle with the greatest certainty of results."
settings.text:
"When I'm looking at a supplement, I'm considering two primary factors – one, is it noticeably effective as determined by, primarily, human trials, and two, is it dosed appropriately. Coastline does both to the fullest degree. Additionally, it does this in one simple supplement matrix that hits all aspects of healthspan, and with a certainty in quality."

– Dr. Nicolas Verhoeven
Ph.D. in Molecular Medicine (Track: Physiology) M.S. Kinesiology - Exercise PhysiologyACSM CPT

settings.heading: "Coastline represents a new era of precision supplementation — one rooted in clarity, science, and consistency."
settings.text:
"Most supplements are built around marketing stories rather than measurable outcomes. What Coastline has done is strip away that noise and focus only on ingredients with real mechanistic data behind them — compounds that directly influence the pathways of cellular health, recovery, and longevity.

For me, that’s the future: fewer ingredients, more certainty, and an evidence-based foundation people can trust every single day."

– Dr. Chris Pollock, PhD

settings.heading: Experts Agree About Coastline
settings.description: Accredited Doctors, nutritionists, and PhDs from around the world all recognize the excellence of Coastline's approach & formulation.

settings.heading: Creatine Monohydrate - 5250 mg
settings.text: The gold standard form for cellular energy metabolism and cognitive function. Supports muscle strength, power output, and brain health while helping maintain ATP production - your body's primary energy currency. Research shows it may help preserve muscle mass and cognitive performance as you age, making everyday activities feel easier and supporting mental clarity throughout your day.

settings.heading: L-Glycine 5000 mg
settings.text: A foundational amino acid that's crucial for collagen synthesis, supporting healthy skin, joints, and connective tissues. Acts as a calming neurotransmitter that can improve sleep quality while supporting detoxification processes in the liver. As glycine production declines with age, supplementation helps maintain tissue repair, wound healing, and may support longevity pathways.

settings.heading: Inulin (from Chicory) 4000 mg
settings.text: A premium prebiotic fiber that selectively feeds beneficial gut bacteria, supporting digestive health and immune function. Helps improve mineral absorption, particularly calcium and magnesium, while promoting regular bowel movements. A healthy gut microbiome is linked to better mood, immune response, and even cognitive function - making this a foundation for overall wellness.

settings.heading: Taurine 3050 mg
settings.text: An essential amino acid that declines significantly with age, supporting cardiovascular health, exercise performance, and cellular protection. Helps regulate electrolyte balance, supports healthy blood pressure, and may improve insulin sensitivity. Research suggests taurine supplementation can help maintain youthful cellular function and energy levels as you age.

settings.heading: Glucosamine 750 mg
settings.text: A building block compound essential for healthy cartilage and joint function. Helps maintain joint mobility, reduces stiffness, and supports the body's natural ability to repair and maintain connective tissues. Particularly important as natural glucosamine production decreases with age, leading to joint discomfort and reduced mobility over time.

settings.heading: Magnesium Citrate 150 mg
settings.text: An essential mineral cofactor in over 300 enzymatic reactions, supporting energy production, muscle function, and nervous system health. Helps regulate blood sugar, supports bone health, and promotes restful sleep. Most people don't get enough magnesium from diet alone, making supplementation crucial for optimal cellular function and stress management.

settings.heading: L-Ergothioneine 5mg
settings.text: A powerful 'longevity vitamin' and master antioxidant that accumulates in tissues throughout the body, particularly the brain, heart, and liver. Provides cellular protection against oxidative stress and inflammation while supporting mitochondrial health. Research suggests it may help maintain cognitive function and support healthy aging at the cellular level.

settings.heading: Coenzyme Q10 200 mg
settings.text: An essential cofactor for mitochondrial energy production, supporting heart health and cellular energy metabolism. Acts as a powerful antioxidant protecting cells from oxidative damage while supporting cardiovascular function. CoQ10 levels naturally decline with age, making supplementation important for maintaining energy levels, exercise performance, and long-term heart health.

settings.heading: Lutein 10 mg
settings.text: A carotenoid antioxidant that selectively accumulates in the retina, providing protection against blue light damage and supporting long-term eye health. Helps maintain visual acuity, reduces eye strain from screen time, and may support cognitive function. As natural lutein leve

settings.heading: Zeaxanthin 2 mg
settings.text: Works synergistically with lutein to form the macular pigment, providing enhanced protection for the central retina and supporting sharp, clear vision. Helps filter harmful blue light, reduces glare sensitivity, and supports overall eye comfort during daily activities. Essential for maintaining long-term eye health and visual performance as you age.

settings.heading: Astaxanthin 6 mg
settings.text: One of nature's most potent antioxidants, providing comprehensive cellular protection and supporting skin health, eye health, and exercise recovery. Helps reduce inflammation, supports cardiovascular health, and may improve skin elasticity and hydration. Research shows it can help reduce exercise-induced fatigue and support overall vitality and healthy aging.

settings.heading: Glucosamine Sulphate 750 mg
settings.text: Supports joint health and cartilage repair during overnight recovery when your body naturally rebuilds and repairs tissues. Helps maintain joint flexibility, reduces morning stiffness, and supports the body's natural healing processes. Taking it in the evening aligns with your body's natural repair cycle for optimal joint support and long-term mobility.

settings.heading: Lithium 400 mcg
settings.text: A trace mineral that supports brain health, mood stability, and cognitive function at safe nutritional doses. May help protect neurons, support healthy brain aging, and promote emotional balance. Research suggests it can support longevity pathways and help maintain cognitive clarity and mental resilience as you age, making it an important component of brain health optimization.

settings.heading: L-Theanine 200 mg
settings.text: An amino acid from tea that promotes calm, focused relaxation without drowsiness while supporting better sleep quality. Helps reduce stress and anxiety, promotes alpha brain wave activity associated with relaxed alertness, and can improve sleep onset and quality. Perfect for evening use to help you unwind and prepare for restorative sleep.

settings.heading: Receive a FREE Glass Shaker ($15 Value) with your Coastline Welcome Pack.

settings.title: When will I notice results?
settings.text: Most members report feeling more consistent energy within the first week, with sleep quality improvements often noticed within 3-5 days. More significant benefits like improved recovery and sustained vitality typically develop over 4-8 weeks of consistent use as your body reaches optimal nutrient levels.

settings.title: How is Coastline different from other supplements?
settings.text: Coastline is a complete AM/PM system targeting 11 body systems and 12 hallmarks of aging, not just isolated nutrients. We use research-backed dosages, third-party testing, and transparent labeling. No proprietary blends, artificial flavors, or under-dosed ingredients common in other products.

settings.title: Can I take Coastline with my current supplements?
settings.text: Coastline is designed as a comprehensive foundation, potentially replacing multiple individual supplements. However, we recommend consulting your healthcare provider before making changes to your current regimen, especially if you take medications or have health conditions.

settings.title: What is your subscription policy?
settings.text: You're in complete control. Pause, skip, or cancel anytime through your account dashboard. No contracts, hidden fees, or cancellation hassles. We'll always show your next charge date and send reminders before processing orders.

settings.title: Is Coastline safe for long-term use?
settings.text: Yes, Coastline uses nutritional doses of ingredients that are generally recognized as safe for long-term use. All ingredients are third-party tested for purity and potency. However, we recommend periodic check-ins with your healthcare provider as part of your overall wellness routine.

settings.title: What if I don't like it?
settings.text: We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied for any reason, contact our customer support team for a full refund. We want you to feel confident trying Coastline risk-free.

settings.title: How do you take Coastline?
settings.text: Take the Morning Blend and SoftGels with breakfast and the Evening Capsules ideally 1-hour before bed. This timing supports natural circadian rhythms and optimizes absorption. Each step is clearly labeled and contains the optimal daily dose.

settings.title: Are there any side effects?
settings.text: Coastline uses ingredients at nutritional doses with excellent safety profiles. Some people may experience mild digestive changes initially as their body adjusts. If you experience any concerning symptoms, discontinue use and consult your healthcare provider.

settings.heading: Didn’t find your answer?
settings.text: Don't hestitate to contact us
